name: CONTRACT-BUG-11
title: feature.json.schema.json tdd_state enum missing merged/deprecated allowed by validator
description: schemas/feature.json.schema.json declares tdd_state enum: [spec, test-red, impl, test-green, review]. scripts/validate-feature.py line 97 allows merged and deprecated additionally. Same mismatch in schemas/registry.json.schema.json. Align both.
